## Texas Instruments beats and raises guidance; debate opens on whether AI upside is fully priced

TXN's beat-and-raise is the most meaningful real-time read on the analog and industrial semiconductor cycle; the AI-upside-already-priced debate directly informs how to size exposure across analog, automotive, and industrial chip names heading into the second half.

- TXN reported results above consensus and issued guidance above prior expectations.
- The headline frames a key post-results debate: is the AI-driven demand tailwind already embedded in the stock's valuation.
- No specific EPS, revenue, or guidance figures are provided in the headline.
- High-confidence semiconductor_cycle and automotive_semiconductor_demand tags reinforce read-through relevance.
